chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Acq. Appeal No. S – 66 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on MA No.4775/2023 3. For hearing of main case 11.12.2023 Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the appellant. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Accordingly, this acquittal appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
